title: Ocean Pollution
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Ocean pollution has (0) one of the most pressing environmental issues of our time. Every year, millions of tonnes of plastic waste end up in our seas, causing devastating harm to marine life. Sea creatures often (1) plastic items for food, leading to injury and death. Microplastics, tiny fragments that result from the breakdown of larger items, have been found in fish consumed by humans, raising serious health (2). Chemical pollution from industrial activities and agricultural (3) also poses a significant threat to ocean ecosystems. These substances can accumulate in the food chain, affecting species at every level. Oil spills, though less frequent than in the past, continue to (4) tremendous damage when they occur. The situation may seem overwhelming, but there are reasons for hope. International agreements have been (5) to reduce plastic production and improve waste management. Many countries have banned single-use plastics, and recycling rates are slowly improving. Scientists are developing innovative solutions, including bacteria that can (6) down certain types of plastic. Individual actions also make a difference: reducing plastic consumption, participating in beach clean-ups, and supporting sustainable businesses all (7) to the solution. Protecting our oceans is not just an environmental issue but a matter of human survival, as healthy seas are (8) for food security and climate regulation.

example.explanation: 'Become' es el verbo correcto para indicar un cambio de estado o condición.

questions.explanation: 'Mistake something for' es la expresión correcta para indicar confundir una cosa con otra.
'Health concerns' es la colocación correcta para expresar preocupaciones relacionadas con la salud.
'Agricultural run-off' es el término técnico para el agua que arrastra productos químicos de los campos.
'Cause damage' es la colocación correcta para expresar provocar daños.
'Signed agreements' es la expresión correcta para indicar que se han firmado acuerdos oficiales.
'Break down' es el phrasal verb correcto para describir la descomposición de materiales.
'Contribute to' es el phrasal verb correcto para expresar que algo ayuda o aporta a un resultado.
'Essential for' es la colocación más enfática para indicar que algo es absolutamente necesario.
